title: typedef for queue causes "Unsupported/illegal unbounded ('$') in this context."

features.name: typedef queue with unbounded slice selector
features.description: Code should include a typedef defining a queue type followed by a variable of that type using an unbounded slice selector with '$' in array notation
features.snippet: typedef byte unsigned byte_q_t[$]; byte_q_t data; data = data[3:$];

features.name: queue typedef declaration
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration for an unbounded queue type using the $ symbol

features.name: unbounded selector in queue slice operation
features.description: Code should include a queue variable being assigned from a slice using the unbounded selector '$' as the upper bound
